overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a tropical coastal environment during golden hour. She traverses from a mangrove forest through shallow turquoise waters along the shoreline, passing ancient wooden ruins and shipwrecks as the sun sets over the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: mangrove forest path along the coast

agents.ego_description: walking along the forested shoreline approaching ancient wooden ruins

entered.detail: large tropical trees with exposed root systems hanging over the water
draping moss hanging from tree branches creating a canopy
clear turquoise shallow water along the shoreline
weathered wooden ruin structure with vertical posts partially submerged

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense mangrove forest with Spanish moss hanging from the canopy. The character walks along a dirt path beside clear turquoise water, approaching ancient wooden fortification ruins visible in the distance on the left.

events.description: character steps from the shore into the shallow water
passing the wooden fortification ruins into open water area

agents.ego_description: entering the shallow turquoise water and passing by the wooden ruin structure on the left

entered.detail: tall rock spires and islands visible in the distance across the water
small landmasses with vegetation on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the forested shore into the shallow water, passing the ancient wooden fortification ruins on the left. The canopy opens up to reveal a wide coastal view with distant rock formations rising from the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: open tidal flats with distant rock formations

events.description: sun becomes visible on the horizon creating golden reflections on the water surface

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow turquoise water toward the setting sun and distant coastline

entered.detail: wooden structures and buildings along the distant shoreline
gentle waves rolling in from the open ocean

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open shallow water with the wooden fort now behind, the character approaches the sunset. Distant rock formations shift to the right as the camera advances, while coastal ruins become visible on the right shoreline and gentle waves roll in from the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunset beach with waves and shipwrecks

events.description: waves begin crashing around the character as the shore becomes more exposed to the open ocean
passing large shipwreck ruins in the water with misty mountains visible in the background

agents.ego_description: walking through the surf along the beach, observing the shipwrecks and distant mountains while the sun creates a bright glare on the water

entered.detail: large rusted shipwreck structures partially submerged in the shallow water
tall mist-covered mountains rising behind the coastline
fog and mist gathering along the distant shore with trees

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the character walking through waves as the sun sits low on the horizon creating a brilliant glare. Large shipwreck ruins emerge on the left in the shallow water, while misty mountains loom in the background. The waves become more prominent, crashing around the character as she explores the coastline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered depths of a mangrove forest into a wide, sun-drenched coastal expanse. It begins on a dirt path beneath a canopy of Spanish moss, moving alongside turquoise water toward ancient wooden fortification ruins. As the character transitions from the forested shore into the shallow water, the canopy opens up to reveal a vast horizon with distant rock formations rising from the ocean. The scene then expands across the open shallows, leaving the fort behind as the camera advances toward the sunset and coastal ruins appear along the right shoreline. Finally, the view shifts toward a brilliant solar glare on the horizon, where large shipwreck ruins emerge from the surf and waves crash around the character against a backdrop of misty mountains.
